summary: Plan-only assessment for one open PR. #81190 is a useful non-security contributor fix candidate, but merge cannot be recommended from this artifact because mergeability is unknown, checks are unavailable due GitHub API rate limiting, comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review proof is present. Recommend repairing/finalizing the contributor branch rather than replacing it.

actions.reason: Repair/finalization is allowed by job permissions, but merge is blocked until live checks, mergeability, comments/review-bot findings, Codex /review, and targeted validation are complete.
A bounded executable repair plan is available and safer than replacement because the contributor branch is editable and the diff is small.

repair_candidate.summary: Finalize contributor PR #81190 by repairing the existing branch if needed, then rerun complete merge preflight. The PR attempts to retry deterministic tool-result truncation before overflow compaction when oversized tool results cause context pressure, preserving the persisted turn after truncation retry.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): truncate tool results before overflow compaction
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Finalizes contributor PR #81190 by @LLagoon3.

Summary:
- Retry deterministic tool-result truncation before overflow compaction when oversized tool results are the likely context-pressure source.
- Preserve the persisted turn after truncation retry.
- Keep the change limited to pi embedded runner overflow handling and focused tests.

Validation required before merge:
- Re-fetch live PR state and confirm mergeability against current main.
- Hydrate comments, review comments, review-bot comments, and checks.
- Address any actionable reviewer or bot findings.
- Run Codex /review and address findings.
- Run targeted overflow compaction tests plus repo changed-file validation.
credit_notes: Preserve LLagoon3 as source PR author for #81190.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary, include: Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81190 by @LLagoon3.
